name: Suspicious Svchost Process
notes: This rule triggers when a suspicious Svchost process is detected.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES 'svchost.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches Command (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches "Command" NOT IMATCHES 'C\:\\Windows\\((System32)|(SysWow64))\\svchost\.exe\s\-k.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Svchost Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES 'svchost.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Command (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches "Command" NOT IMATCHES 'C\:\\Windows\\((System32)|(SysWow64))\\svchost\.exe\s\-k.*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Suspicious Svchost Process
Event description: Detected a Suspicious Svchost Process
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add the "sourceIP" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Compromised Hosts"
